overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running along a forest trail through a mountainous woodland area. The character moves steadily along a dirt path surrounded by pine trees, transitioning between sunlit clearings and shaded forest sections.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with mountain vistas

agents.ego_description: Geralt is running steadily along the wide forest path heading toward the distant mountains, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: Dense evergreen pine trees lining both sides of the trail
Snow-capped mountains visible in the distance through the trees
Narrow dirt trail winding through grass and wildflowers
Yellow and white wildflowers growing alongside the path
Grassy terrain with scattered low vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunlit forest trail with Geralt running forward. Tall pine trees frame the path on both sides while snow-capped mountains are visible in the distance. The ground is covered with grass and wildflowers, and the sky is partly cloudy with good visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense shaded forest corridor with overhead canopy

events.description: entering dense tree canopy significantly reduces ambient light levels

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the darker forest section where dense tree cover blocks most sunlight

entered.detail: Thick overhead tree cover blocking sky visibility
Bare dead tree trunk without leaves standing among the pines

segments.scene_description: The character enters a densely wooded section where the overhead canopy blocks most sunlight, creating a shaded corridor. The path becomes rockier and more uneven. A dead tree stands out on the left side, and the distant mountains are no longer visible through the thick tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed forest trail with alternating sunlit patches

events.description: exiting dense canopy cover back into areas with direct sunlight filtering through trees

agents.ego_description: running along the winding path as lighting alternates between bright sunlit patches and shaded tree cover

entered.detail: Distant mountains becoming visible again through breaks in the tree line

segments.scene_description: The trail emerges from the dense shaded section into mixed lighting where sunlight filters through the pine canopy. The path returns to a grassy dirt surface, and the distant mountains become visible again in the background. The forest remains thick with tall pines on both sides as the character continues running forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transitions from a bright, open vista into a dark woodland corridor before returning to a sunlit clearing. It begins with Geralt running forward on a grassy path framed by tall pines, with snow-capped mountains clearly visible under a partly cloudy sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a densely wooded section where the overhead canopy blocks the sunlight and obscures the distant peaks, turning the trail into a rocky, shaded corridor marked by a dead tree. The trail then emerges from the thick cover into a region of mixed lighting where sunlight filters through the pine needles. Finally, the path returns to a grassy surface as the distant mountains reappear in the background while the character continues his steady run.
